name: Composition API component with defineModel and Pinia
description: Validate that the skill correctly guides creation of a Vue 3.5 component using script setup, defineModel for two-way binding, and Pinia for shared state.
prompt: Create a Vue 3.5 SearchFilter component using <script setup lang="ts"> that has a text input with two-way binding via defineModel(), a category dropdown using defineProps with TypeScript generics, and reads/writes filter state from a Pinia store using the Composition API setup syntax. Emit a 'search' event when the user submits. Include computed properties for the filtered result count.

assertions.description: Must use defineModel() for two-way binding instead of manual modelValue + update:modelValue pattern
Must use defineProps with TypeScript generics for compile-time type-safe prop declarations
Must use Pinia defineStore for shared filter state management with devtools support
Must use computed() for derived values like filtered result count to leverage caching
Must use <script setup> syntax for the most concise and performant Composition API component

name: Vue Router with Nuxt SSR and route middleware
description: Validate that the skill correctly implements a Nuxt 3 page with SSR data fetching, route middleware for auth, and typed route parameters.
prompt: Implement a Nuxt 3 product detail page at pages/products/[id].vue that fetches product data using useFetch with SSR, defines a route middleware that redirects unauthenticated users to /login, uses definePageMeta for route configuration, and includes proper TypeScript typing for the route params. Handle loading and error states with NuxtErrorBoundary.

assertions.description: Must use Nuxt's useFetch composable for SSR-compatible data fetching with automatic deduplication
Must use definePageMeta to configure route metadata including middleware assignment
Must implement route middleware for authentication guard that redirects to login
Must access typed route parameters for the product ID from the dynamic [id] segment
Must use <script setup> syntax consistent with Nuxt 3 and Vue 3.5 conventions
